title: Exact Finite Statistical Test Checks

solver_reuse.target: exact binomial bad tail-count QF_LIA/Diophantine regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite binomial tail-count contradiction where C(4,3)+C(4,4) forces tail_count = 5 but the malformed p-value row claims tail_count = 4.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional exact-test count rows only when they add distinct integer-count solver pressure; keep asymptotic tests, approximations, and floating-point statistical procedures in numerical-honesty metadata.

graduation_criteria: Encode exact finite p-value claims as deterministic finite-count and rational-arithmetic obligations.
Replay binomial and hypergeometric witnesses through exact combinatorics.
Keep promoted bad finite-count rows tied to checked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence.
Add two-sided Fisher and exact multinomial tests before claiming broader exact-test coverage.
Keep asymptotic tests, normal approximations, floating-point libraries, and model-selection claims under numerical-honesty metadata.
